c.n: User Interface and Ease of Use
c.d: The intuitiveness and user-friendliness of the app's interface, facilitating efficient note-taking.
The app's availability across multiple operating systems and devices, ensuring seamless access.
The range of functionalities offered, such as multimedia support, collaboration tools, and integration capabilities.
Measures implemented to protect user data, including encryption and privacy policies.
The pricing structure of the app relative to the features provided, assessing its overall value proposition.
